AR1.justification: The Go/No-go decision was written into the runbook's specified artifact location (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md) per the runbook's explicit routing instruction, not misrouted to decisions.md or daybook.

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced the named checklist artifact on disk, and step 2 wrote the Go/No-go synthesis with item-by-item reasoning into that same artifact, so each step's output is readable by the next.

AR3.justification: All cross-references (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md, tmp/release-2.4/notes.md) use relative paths consistent with the methodology and resolve (or correctly identify the missing input).

AR4.justification: Actions are scoped to a release-id-namespaced path (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/), so re-running for v2.4 overwrites coherently and other releases get their own directories without conflict.
